name: Screenshot Machine
description: This app integrates with the Screenshot Machine service
setup_instructions:
## Get a Screenshot Machine API key

Screenshot Machine renders a screenshot of any URL without your analyst ever opening the link in a browser — useful for phishing triage and suspicious-URL review.

### 1. Register an account
1. Open https://www.screenshotmachine.com/register.php and sign up.
2. Verify the email link.

### 2. Copy your customer key
1. Log in and go to your dashboard at https://www.screenshotmachine.com/dashboard.php.
2. Copy the **Customer Key** shown at the top — a short alphanumeric string (e.g. `a1b2c3`).

### 3. Paste the key below
Paste in the **API Key** field. T1 sends it as the `key` query-string parameter on every request — there's no header prefix.

Click **Test Authentication** to confirm. The test issues a low-cost screenshot of `https://example.com` and expects an image response.

### Tier-gated options
- **Free**: 100 screenshots/month, watermarked, JPG only, max 1024×768.
- **Paid plans**: no watermark, PNG/PDF output, full-page captures, larger resolutions, custom delay, ad blocking, cookie banner dismissal.

The `get_screenshot` action exposes optional params (`dimension`, `format`, `delay`, `device`) — T1 only sends what you set.

### Rate limits
- Per-plan monthly cap. Burst limits are loose. T1 surfaces a `QuotaExceededError` on 429 or on an over-limit JSON error response.

### Troubleshooting
- **`Invalid customer key`**: Key wrong or account suspended. Re-copy from dashboard.
- **Returns watermarked image on paid plan**: Plan downgrade hit — check billing.
- **`Page load timeout`**: Slow target or sites that block headless browsers (some Cloudflare-protected pages). Try with `delay=3000` or higher.
- **Output is JSON not an image**: That JSON contains an error — log it and surface to the analyst.

actions.name: Get Screenshot
actions.description: Get a screenshot of a URL

parameters.name: dimension
parameters.description: Size of the web snapshot or webpage screenshot in format [width]x[height]. (Default: 120x90)

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The filename for storing the screenshot in the Vault

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: Based on delay value(in seconds) capturing engine should wait before the screenshot is created, (Default: 200)
